problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Liquid crystal elastomer actuation — specifically Liquid crystal elastomer — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
